name: BlueJammer-V2 — BW16 controller [LAB-ONLY / illegal to operate]
description: EmenstaNougat/BlueJammer-V2 BW16/RTL8720DN web controller + UART master (hosts the 5 GHz control AP + web UI; bridges the ESP32 engine's telemetry). *** LAB-ONLY / ILLEGAL TO OPERATE (FCC 47 U.S.C. 333). *** Same AmebaD 3-file layout as the rtl8720 profile; flashed by the rtl8720 backend. CC has no operate/transmit control over serial.

control.note: CONTROL SURFACE (documented, not driven): the device is operated from this self-hosted web UI after joining its AP, plus the physical button. There is NO serial command channel, so CC cannot (and per the illegal-to-operate framing does not) key the transmitter. A future in-app control panel would POST to the web UI's mode endpoints — those must be captured on real hardware first, and gated behind the illegal-tx confirmation.

firmware_urls.note: km0_boot_all / km4_boot_all / km0_km4_image2 from the v0.2 Release (pinned) + the SRAM loader reused from the rtl8720 bundle. Fetched + SHA-256-verified by flash_core.BlueJammerBw16Profile via the rtl8720 backend.

note: Needs Realtek's upload_image_tool on the host (set CYBERC_AMEBAD_TOOL or drop it in tools/realtek/ with cygwin1.dll on Windows) — same as the rtl8720 profile. Closed-source firmware; bins pinned, never vendored.
